feedback: Implemented basic systemd service and timer for janitor and executed cron script, but lacking comprehensive testing, documentation, and edge‑case handling. The changes are minimal and do not cover all required functionality or integration points.
issues: No unit or integration tests added for new service/timer
Missing documentation for service configuration
Edge cases (e.g., service failure, timer mis‑schedule) not handled
No verification that janitor jobs run correctly after service start
Potential conflicts with existing systemd units not checked

feedback: Core functionality for janitor setup is present with systemd service/timer, cron script execution, and cleanup actions, but missing explicit verification of MCP endpoints and router resolve, and no test coverage for new janitor-related code.
issues: Unclear status of MCP-related endpoints not addressed
Potential leftover git directory cleanup issue not resolved
No explicit verification that router resolve succeeded
No test coverage for new janitor-related code

feedback: Core functionality works but important aspects missing.
issues: No test coverage for new code (tasks.py, janitor-cron.sh, systemd service/timer)
Barely started or mostly wrong approach for some actions (e.g., rm /home/ubuntu/git in ci.sh)
Untracked files created (STATE.md duplicated)
No diff available for code changes
Partial implementation of janitor cleanup (verify test data step incomplete)

feedback: Implemented systemd service and timer for janitor cron and updated cron script, but no tests added, edge cases not addressed, and potential repository removal noted. The work is partial and may miss critical functionality.
issues: No test coverage for new service/timer
Edge cases for cron execution not handled
Potential accidental removal of /home/ubuntu/git repository
Untracked files remain unaddressed
Missing documentation updates for new components

feedback: Implemented basic janitor cron service and script, but lacking comprehensive testing, error handling, and integration checks. Edge cases and robustness are not addressed.
issues: No unit or integration tests for new cron functionality
Script assumes Argus service availability without verification
Missing cleanup or retry logic
Potential race conditions with systemd service start
No documentation on usage or configuration
